questions.question: Explain why modularity alone is insufficient for evaluating community detection quality.
expectedPoints: Modularity has resolution limit problem (misses small communities)
Can be maximized even in random networks
Different network structures may yield similar modularity scores

questions.question: Describe a comprehensive framework for evaluating community detection algorithms, including both internal and external methods.
expectedPoints: Internal evaluation: modularity, conductance, internal density
External evaluation: NMI, ARI, F-score when ground truth available
Stability testing through parameter variation and cross-validation
Consideration of computational complexity and scalability
Interpretation of conflicting results from different metrics
